name: testing-react-native-apps
description: Testing React Native Apps 是来自 callstackincubator/agent-skills 的 Codex 插件。
longDescription: Testing React Native Apps 来自 https://github.com/callstackincubator/agent-skills，已通过自动结构校验和静态安全检查。 源仓库说明：Includes React Native skills from callstack/react-native-testing-library and callstackincubator/agent-device for test writing, device-driven verification, accessibility checks, and exploratory QA.
author: Callstack
